summary: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering from Telkom University (GPA 3.50). Experienced Full Stack Developer adopting a Vibe Engineering mindset with expertise in React, Next.js, and automated workflow pipelines. Specialist in complex multi-API integrations (OpenAI, MCP, Midtrans, Watzap, and various third-party services), payment gateway systems, and robust cloud deployments (GCP, VPS/Linux). Proven track record of delivering high-impact solutions, including a platform that achieved IDR 100M+ revenue post-launch.
